CLAIM,STAKE & RECEIVE $WSM AIRDROP NOW

We recommend you stake your $WSM to earn rewards. Alternatively, you can claim your $WSM to your wallet.
The token address is 0x3cdC610b00D4eB27009aB4E506241dBAd8666B50 which will allow you to add the token to your wallet.

GAMING NET REVENUE BUY BACK

WSM BUY BACK PROGRAM

To support the long life of the $WSM token, we’ll be using a minimum of 10% of Net Gaming Revenue to buy the $WSM on the open market. These tokens will accumulate daily and will either be added to the staking rewards pool, used for casino rewards, or burnt.
